llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 13.1 (Recognition of Classified Employees) moved from later in agenda to immediately after oral communication, before oral communication based on president's request. All bond program consent items (6.1) moved to action items to allow for public comment. One additional staff recognition added under 13.1.
